authors: Ross Dahlke Ryan C. Moore Priyanjana Bengani Jeffrey T. Hancock
raw_title: The Consumption of Pink Slime Journalism: Who, What, When, Where, and Why?
title_en: The Consumption of Pink Slime Journalism: Who, What, When, Where, and Why?
title_zh: 粉色污泥新闻的消费：谁、什么、何时、何地以及为什么？
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了人们如何消费所谓的“粉色污泥新闻”——一种看似本地但实际内容空洞或带有偏见的新闻。研究者分析了谁在看这类新闻、他们看什么内容、在什么时间、通过什么平台以及为什么会被吸引。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how people consume so-called 'pink slime journalism'—news that appears local but is actually shallow or biased. Researchers analyze who reads it, what content they consume, when, on which platforms, and why they are attracted.
research_direction_zh: 数字新闻消费与受众行为研究
research_direction_en: Digital journalism consumption and audience behavior
